name: Agent State Self Regulation
description: OpenClaw-native adapter for runtime state assessment, prompt injection, and host capability-aware session regulation.

tightPercent.label: Tight Threshold
tightPercent.help: Context pressure threshold applied to runtime.agent.getContextUsage().

criticalPercent.label: Critical Threshold
criticalPercent.help: Critical pressure threshold applied to runtime.agent.getContextUsage().

defaultProfile.label: Default Profile
defaultProfile.help: Default profile hint used when the adapter requests compaction.

enableNewSession.label: Enable New Session
enableNewSession.help: Allows the adapter and the agent tool to request fresh-session transitions.

injectRuntimeState.label: Inject Runtime State
injectRuntimeState.help: Prepends runtime state metadata to the agent prompt when the adapter has actionable data to inject.
